message:
🌱 Add external-secrets: Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging mission (#797)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "external-secrets-5426-namespace-finalizer-not-getting-cleaned-up-causing-hanging",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "external-secrets: Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging namespace deleting",
+    "description": "Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging namespace deleting. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify external-secrets troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your external-secrets deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review external-secrets configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets
```
The namespace finalizer `externalsecrets.external-secrets.io/ces-<xyz>` is not getting cleaned up on namespace deletion, causing it to hang indefinitely 

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
```
    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret

```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging…",
+        "description": "## Problem Statement

What is the problem you're trying to solve?
Hopefully Fixes https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/5426
How do you like to solve the issue and why?

## Format

Please ensure that your PR follows the following format for the title:
```
feat(scope): add new
```yaml
- apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret
      metadata:
        name: &license-name nservicebus-license
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      stringData:
        license.xml: xyz

    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: ServiceAccount
      metadata:
        name: &auth-sa nsb-external-secrets
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
    - apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
      kind: Role
      metadata:
        name: read-source-secret
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      rules:
      - apiGroups: [""]
        resourceNames:
        - *license-name
        resou
```
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Problem Statement

What is the problem you're trying to solve?
Hopefully Fixes https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/5426
How do you like to solve the issue and why?

## Format

Please ensure that your PR follows the following format for the title:
```
feat(scope): add new feature
fix(scope): fix bug
docs(scope): update documentation
chore(scope): update build tool or",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "- apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret
      metadata:
        name: &license-name nservicebus-license
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      stringData:
        license.xml: xyz

    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: ServiceAccount
      metadata:
        name: &auth-sa nsb-external-secrets
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
    - apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
      kind: Role
      metadata:
        name: read-source-secret
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      rules:
      - apiGroups: [""]
        resourceNames:
        - *license-name
        resources:
        - secrets
        verbs:
        - get
        - list
        - watch
      - apiGroups:
        - authorization.k8s.io
        resources:
        - selfsubjectrulesreviews
        verbs",

  name: tradera-"
